name: Overheat
subtypes: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
effect_text: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle. Then, return up to 1 active Character with a cost of 3 or less to the owner's hand. [Trigger] Return up to 1 card with a cost of 4 or less to the owner's hand.  This card has been officially errata'd.
